headline: Horror Indie 'Oddities' Lands Global Sales with Raven Banner
lede: Tyler Savage's supernatural thriller secures international distribution after Brussels festival debut, positioning the project for broader market exposure.
body:
Raven Banner Entertainment is making strategic moves in the indie horror landscape by acquiring world sales rights to Tyler Savage's atmospheric genre project *Oddities*.

The acquisition arrives on the heels of the film's successful premiere at the Brussels International Fantastic Film Festival, signaling growing industry interest in Savage's distinctive narrative approach. Savage, previously recognized for his work on *Stalker*, continues to build momentum with this latest genre exploration.

The ensemble cast features rising talents Lilimar and Lovie Simone alongside veteran performer Adrienne Barbeau, offering a compelling generational blend of acting talent. Each performer brings significant genre credibility, with Barbeau's horror legacy providing substantial narrative weight to the project.

Industry observers note Raven Banner's selective approach to genre acquisitions, suggesting *Oddities* represents a promising addition to their distribution portfolio. The film's festival trajectory and emerging star power position it as a potential breakout indie horror title for the upcoming market season.

As international sales commence at Cannes, *Oddities* represents another example of ambitious independent genre filmmaking finding strategic pathways to global audiences.
key_facts: World sales rights acquired by Raven Banner
Premiered at Brussels International Fantastic Film Festival
Cast includes Lilimar, Lovie Simone, Adrienne Barbeau
